qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, t1.oi_personal_emp as B_oi_personal_emp, t1.e_numero_legajo as B_e_numero_legajo, SEC.policy, t1.e_numero_legajo as CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, t1.oi_empresa as B_oi_empresa, t1.oi_personal as B_oi_personal FROM ACC01_PERSONAL as t0,PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as t1,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC, d_personal_emp JOIN t0.oi_personal_emp RIGHT OUTER t1.oi_personal_emp,t1.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_personal_emp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, t1.oi_personal_emp as B_oi_personal_emp, SEC.policy FROM ACC01_PERSONAL as t0,PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as t1,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_personal_emp RIGHT OUTER t1.oi_personal_emp,t1.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_personal_emp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.LegajoAccidentes.PERSONAL_EMP.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.LegajoAccidentes.PERSONAL_EMP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ACC01_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp) as CNT from ACC01_PERSONAL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ACC01_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ACC01_PERSONAL.d_personal_emp,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ACC01_PERSONAL.c_personal_emp,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LIC
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia_per FROM PER02_LICEN_PER WHERE PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio = {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_inicio)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LIC_ART
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia_per FROM PER02_LICEN_PER WHERE PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio = {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_inicio2)} ')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.label: Generar Licencia a cargo del empleador y ART?
attribute.name: l_art

form-properties.label: Generar Licencia a cargo del empleador y ART?

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.LegajoAccidentes.ACCIDENTE.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.LegajoAccidentes.ACCIDENTE.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ACC01_ACCIDENTES.oi_accidente) as CNT from ACC01_ACCIDENTES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ACC01_ACCIDENTES.oi_accidente={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ACC01_ACCIDENTES.oi_accidente,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ACC01_ACCIDENTES.oi_accidente,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and ACC01_ACCIDENTES.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.LegajoAccidentes.TESTIGO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.LegajoAccidentes.TESTIGO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ACC01_TESTIGOS.oi_testigo) as CNT from ACC01_TESTIGOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ACC01_TESTIGOS.oi_testigo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ACC01_TESTIGOS.d_apellido,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ACC01_TESTIGOS.e_testigo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and ACC01_TESTIGOS.oi_accidente={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
